title: Promenade Compatible
description: Never lose your stuff anymore when upgrading Promenade!
body:
This is a fork of [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade) that upgrades your worlds without losing any items or blocks.

The fork stems from [PR #179](https://github.com/DawnTeamMC/Promenade/pull/179) of the official Promenade repository. Feel free to switch back to the official release of Promenade, as this fork only serves as a solution for world upgrading.
